features.name: validif with false condition and negative operand
features.description: Code should include a validif operation with a false condition (UInt<1>(1'b0)) and a negative SInt constant operand, where the result is assigned to an output
features.snippet:
circuit top_mod:
  module top_mod:
    output tmp21: SInt<6>
    tmp21 <= validif(UInt<1>("b0"), SInt<6>("b1111"))

features.name: validif false condition result should be sign_extended
features.description: Code should include a validif operation where the false condition causes the negative operand to be returned, demonstrating that the result should be sign-extended to the full output width
